domain.title: Target Domain
domain.description: The domain to scrape ads for (e.g., tesla.com)

region.title: Region
region.description: Region to scrape from (e.g., US, GB, CA, anywhere)

maxResults.title: Max Results
maxResults.description: Maximum number of ads to scrape

extractHeadlines.title: Extract Headlines (OCR)
extractHeadlines.description: Extract headline and description text from ad images using OCR. Fast (~2-3 seconds per ad).

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Select proxies to use. Automatic mode works on all plans. Residential proxies are recommended for best results with Google Ads.
